Do you know what the biggest problem in trading is?

It’s not making the right analysis — it’s staying consistent with it.

That’s where Quantivex AI comes in.

Its AI-powered engine continuously scans the market and evaluates multiple timeframes together, focusing on a single clear scenario. It avoids unnecessary trades and selects only meaningful opportunities.

During downturns, it aims to minimize losses by avoiding uncontrolled trades.  
During uptrends, it helps capture opportunities earlier and maximize potential gains.

For those who prefer, it offers fully automated trading, as well as a signal-only mode based on AI analysis.

For more details:  
👉 https://t.co/SNBQxtdzW7

The problem with “AI trading bot” framing is that it often jumps too quickly from signal to execution.

Before capital is exposed, traders need:

market context,
risk posture,
paper validation,
execution assumptions,
and clear supervision.

Automation without structure is fragile.

tweets.full_text:
I finally ran the @ManicTrade  AI trading benchmark today and it's better than I thought.

The setup was smooth, even though it took a little bit of time for it to run, bottom line it was a good experience and I actually enjoyed the process

I used Antigravity as my AI tool , my first score was 66/100. CLASS_C...low right😔, my data was the weak point at 35%, decision came in strongest at 80%. not bad for a first attempt but I knew I could do better.

So first thing I did was change the AI model I used in antigravity to a more advanced one and guess what
I got better results, from 63/100 Class C to 73/100 CLASS B (data jumped from 35% → 65%, analysis up to 80%, decision 85%, risk 80%)

What I noticed the scoring is multi dimensional and the LLM evaluator reads your reasoning, not just your output and using a more advanced AI model gives you better results.

Overall my experience was fun and I learnt new things, I can boldly say @ManicTrade  are building one of the most interesting AI benchmarks in this space

Be part of the future; https://t.co/ywGxa5OSWg

user.name: 商標速報bot (しばらくは遅報bot)
user.description:
最新の公開商標公報に掲載されている全商標登録出願の概要を投稿している非公式botです。
投稿した商標は、まだ出願されただけの段階で、特許庁の審査を経て登録されたものではありません。
なお、OCR結果および画像のALTについては、内容の正確性を保証するものではありません。
個人による出願の削除依頼は@kwixilvrへ。
